inner_peace.title: Inner Peace Path
inner_peace.description: A 21-day journey to find lasting tranquility through daily practices focused on calm and stress relief.

1.title: Finding Stillness
1.description: Begin your journey by connecting with the stillness within.
1.affirmation: I am at peace with myself and the world around me.
1.journalPrompt: What does inner peace mean to you?

2.title: Breath Awareness
2.description: Discover the calming power of conscious breathing.
2.affirmation: With each breath, I invite calmness and release worry.
2.journalPrompt: How does your breath affect your emotional state?

3.title: Releasing Tension
3.description: Learn to release physical and mental tension.
3.affirmation: I release what no longer serves me with love.
3.journalPrompt: Where do you hold tension in your body?

4.title: Present Moment
4.description: Find peace in moments of silence and solitude.
4.affirmation: In silence, I find my true self.
4.journalPrompt: What arises when you sit in silence?

5.title: Self-Compassion
5.description: Peace begins with how we treat ourselves. Today we cultivate deep self-compassion.
5.affirmation: I am worthy of love and kindness. I treat myself with the same compassion I offer others.
5.journalPrompt: What would you tell your younger self?

6.title: Grounding Presence
6.description: Ground yourself in the present moment.
6.affirmation: I am grounded, centered, and secure.

7.title: Peaceful Integration
7.description: Integrate your learnings into daily life.
7.affirmation: Peace flows through me in every moment.
7.journalPrompt: How will you maintain peace in daily life?
7.mantraText: Om Shanti Shanti Shanti — peace in body, speech, and mind.
7.breathingDescription: 4-7-8 breath: inhale 4, hold 7, exhale 8 slowly, for five rounds.

8.title: Gratitude & Softening
8.description: Cultivate gentle gratitude for small things that held you today.
8.affirmation: I soften where life meets me.
8.journalPrompt: What three small things felt quietly supportive today?
8.mantraText: Thank you — I receive the good that is already here.
8.breathingDescription: Soft belly breath: inhale kindness, exhale tension, six slow cycles.

9.title: Body Awareness Scan
9.description: Slowly move attention from head to toe without needing to fix anything.
9.affirmation: My body is allowed to be as it is.
9.journalPrompt: Where did you notice unexpected ease in the body?
9.mantraText: Within this form, awareness rests and finds space.
9.breathingDescription: Equal inhale and exhale (4-4) while scanning one body area per breath.

10.title: Loving-Kindness (Metta)
10.description: Offer simple phrases of goodwill toward yourself, then toward others.
10.affirmation: May I be peaceful; may all beings be peaceful.
10.journalPrompt: Who did your kindness naturally include today — including you?
10.mantraText: May I be safe. May I be well. May I be at ease.
10.breathingDescription: Breathe in care for yourself; breathe out care for someone you choose gently.

11.title: Healthy Boundaries
11.description: Peace sometimes requires a clear, kind limit that protects your energy.
11.affirmation: I protect my peace with clarity and care.
11.journalPrompt: Where does a gentle boundary feel needed — without apology?
11.mantraText: No can be love when it protects what is sacred.
11.breathingDescription: Box breathing: 4 in, 4 hold, 4 out, 4 hold — three full boxes.

12.title: Earth & Grounding
12.description: Feel weight, contact points, and the steady support beneath you.
12.affirmation: I am supported; I belong here.
12.journalPrompt: What steadied you in nature, sound, or simple contact today?
12.mantraText: Roots breathe downward; crown opens upward; I am held between.
12.breathingDescription: Longer exhale than inhale (in 3, out 6) with feet pressing lightly into the floor.

13.title: Sacred Sound
13.description: Use humming, mantra, or soothing tones to settle the nervous system.
13.affirmation: Sound moves through me and leaves quiet.
13.journalPrompt: What sound — or silence after sound — brought you calm?
13.mantraText: Hum on the exhale on a comfortable pitch for five minutes.
13.breathingDescription: Inhale through the nose; exhale with a gentle closed-mouth hum.

14.title: Reflection at the Threshold
14.description: Halfway invitation: notice what has softened since you began.
14.affirmation: I honor how far I have come.
14.journalPrompt: What pattern feels softer now than on Day 1?
14.mantraText: Each step counts; nothing real is wasted.
14.breathingDescription: Natural breath while naming three wins — one word per exhale.

15.title: Patience & Allowing
15.description: Let insight arrive; stop forcing the moment to become something else.
15.affirmation: Timing belongs to life; I practice patience.
15.journalPrompt: Where did patience change the texture of your day?
15.mantraText: This too belongs in the unfoldment of peace.
15.breathingDescription: Sit with uncontrolled breath for three minutes — only witnessing.

16.title: Releasing the Need to Control
16.description: Loosen the grip on outcomes; return again to the breath.
16.affirmation: I do my part and release the rest.
16.journalPrompt: What are you willing to stop forcing — even a little?
16.mantraText: Surrender is strength when I trust the greater rhythm.
16.breathingDescription: Sigh out the mouth on each exhale — inhale easy through the nose, five times.

17.title: Simplicity & Enoughness
17.description: Choose one small simplification; savor what is already present.
17.affirmation: Enough is a gate to peace.
17.journalPrompt: What felt spacious when you chose simplicity today?
17.mantraText: What is here is already teaching me quiet.
17.breathingDescription: One-minute micro-pauses: three times today, three conscious breaths each.

18.title: Forgiveness & Release
18.description: A light forgiveness practice — begin with yourself.
18.affirmation: I release the story that keeps pain alive.
18.journalPrompt: What apology does your own heart need to hear from you?
18.mantraText: I forgive myself for forgetting my wholeness.
18.breathingDescription: Hand on heart: inhale acceptance, exhale blame — two minutes.

19.title: Trust & Opening
19.description: Trust the path; opening is not collapse but responsive softness.
19.affirmation: I trust what I cannot yet see.
19.journalPrompt: What becomes possible when you trust a little more?
19.mantraText: The same peace that holds stars holds me.
19.breathingDescription: Heart-space breathing: imagine warmth on inhale, soft expansion on exhale.

20.title: Living Integration
20.description: Weave your practices into ordinary moments — not only formal sittings.
20.affirmation: Peace is practiced in small, repeatable rituals.
20.journalPrompt: How will you remember peace at a fixed time tomorrow (e.g. noon)?
20.mantraText: Ordinary moments are altars when I bring presence.
20.breathingDescription: Before a routine task you do daily, take one slow exhale-first breath.

21.title: Seal Your Peace
21.description: Choose one anchor — breath, mantra, or boundary — for the month ahead.
21.affirmation: My peace is a living practice, not a finished event.
21.journalPrompt: What single habit will you keep to protect what you cultivated here?
21.mantraText: I seal this calm as a vow to my future self.
21.breathingDescription: Three deep breaths: inhale gratitude for the journey, exhale commitment.

1.title: Finding Stillness

This process may help promote balance, calm, and clarity, supporting body, mind, and spirit.

aiIncome.title: AI Income Engine
aiIncome.whatIsIt: What is the AI Income Engine?
aiIncome.overviewP1: The AI Income Engine teaches you how to leverage artificial intelligence tools to create automated income streams. From content creation to digital products, AI can accelerate your path to financial freedom.
aiIncome.overviewP2: No technical skills required—we guide you step by step.
aiIncome.ideaContentDesc: Use ChatGPT and Claude to write articles, social media posts, and marketing copy for clients.
aiIncome.ideaArtDesc: Create and sell AI-generated art, logos, and graphics using Midjourney or DALL-E.
aiIncome.ideaAutomationDesc: Help businesses automate tasks using tools like Zapier and Make with AI integrations.
aiIncome.ideaCoursesDesc: Create educational content using AI assistance and sell it online.
aiIncome.ideaChatbotsDesc: Build and sell custom chatbots for businesses using no-code platforms.
aiIncome.step1Desc: Pick an AI skill that interests you (writing, design, automation, etc.)
aiIncome.step2Desc: Master 1-2 AI tools relevant to your chosen niche.

transmissionScripts.0: Welcome to your home's evolution. Before we move a single chair or paint a single wall, we must invite the energy of abundance to co-create with us. Stand in your entryway. Place your hand on your heart. Visualize a golden invitation being sent from your spirit to the spirit of this house. State clearly: 'I am here. I am ready. Let us transform together.' Feel the quiet response of the space around you.
transmissionScripts.1: Stand in the center of your home (the Brahmasthan). Sprinkle a mixture of sea salt and turmeric water to cleanse the psychic debris. As you do, chant 'OM'—the primordial sound of the hub. Say: 'I clear the center. I open the heart of this home. Let Prana flow without obstruction.'
transmissionScripts.2: Face your main entrance. Place a small bowl containing white rice and a single copper coin to the right side of the threshold. Wipe the door frame with sandalwood oil to attract grace. Chant 'GAM'—the frequency of Ganesha, the remover of obstacles. Say: 'Through this door, only prosperity and light may pass. All shadows are dissolved at the threshold.'
transmissionScripts.3: In the North angle of your living space, place a vibrant Jade or Money Plant. Chant 'GLAUM' to vibrate the Earth and Space elements into expansion. Say: 'May every word spoken here be seeds of wealth. May every movement be a dance of joy and connection.'
transmissionScripts.4: Stand before your stove. Place a small jar of pure Ghee nearby as an offering to Agni. Chant 'RAM' to harmonize the transformative heat. Say: 'This space nourishes my dreams. My creation is pure and full of life.' Visualize the fire transmuting raw potential into golden abundance.
transmissionScripts.5: Face the absolute North. Secure a clean mirror on the North wall to visually 'double' the incoming wealth. Add blue flowers or a bowl of water nearby. Chant 'SHREEM'—the resonance of Lakshmi. Say: 'I am a magnet for the infinite current of wealth. My North is open, deep, and clear.'
transmissionScripts.6: Locate the North-East. Keep it empty and light. Place pure water in a polished copper bowl. Chant 'EEM'—the frequency of Saraswati. Say: 'I receive cosmic guidance. My vision is clear. I act with wisdom and divine support.' Feel the clarity descending into the space.
transmissionScripts.7: Sit in the South-West of your bedroom. Place a piece of Amethyst or a heavy smooth stone here to anchor your roots. Chant 'LUM'—the sound of the Earth element. Say: 'I am safe. I am stable. My foundations are unshakeable. My rest is my recovery.' Feel the weight of the earth supporting your nervous system.
transmissionScripts.8: Stand near your router or primary technology hub. Place a piece of Shungite or Black Tourmaline nearby to absorb chaotic frequencies. Chant 'HUM' to create a protective vibrational shield. Say: 'My tools serve me. My mirrors reflect beauty. I control the frequency of my home.' Visualize a dark blue field protecting the space.
transmissionScripts.9: Open your safe or savings box. Tie a small red thread around the handle or inside the box. Chant 'KREEM' to lock the energy of preservation. Say: 'My wealth is protected by time. My reserves grow silently. I have more than enough to share and to shine.'
transmissionScripts.10: Light a Ghee lamp in the center of your home. Slowly circle the center three times clockwise. Chant 'HREEM'—the universal seal. Say: 'This home is now a temple. It is a field of abundance. It is sealed in light. And so it is.' Feel the house settle into a deep, vibrant harmony.

privacyDialog.title: Privacy & Security
privacyDialog.securityIntro: We take your safety seriously so you can focus fully on your healing. Your data is stored securely in a professional cloud database protected by modern encryption and the highest security standards.
privacyDialog.privateAccessDesc: We use Row Level Security (RLS), which means your personal details and birth data are fully locked from outsiders. Only you can access your information.
privacyDialog.whyStoredDesc: Your birth place and time are stored only so the app can calculate your unique Vedic profile and give you personal recommendations in real time.
privacyDialog.yourControlDesc: You own your data. If you choose to leave the app and delete your account, your information is permanently removed from our systems in accordance with GDPR.
privacyDialog.closingNote: Your details are a personal key to your journey with us — and we make sure that key stays with you.

ayurvedaQuiz.loadingSub: The Akasha-Neural Archive maps your Prakriti with Siddha wisdom.
ayurvedaQuiz.idSubtitle: Birth data activates Jyotish-Ayurveda alignment for higher accuracy
ayurvedaQuiz.situationSub: This unlocks your personalized Siddha healing path
ayurvedaQuiz.challengePlaceholder: e.g. High work stress, sleep issues, relationship tension, digestive problems, financial anxiety…
ayurvedaQuiz.bodySubtitle: Observe your physical frame as it naturally is
ayurvedaQuiz.bodyQ: My natural body frame and weight tendency is:
ayurvedaQuiz.bodyVataD: Thin build, hard to gain weight, prominent joints, dry skin
ayurvedaQuiz.bodyPittaD: Athletic build, warm skin, strong digestion, prone to heat
ayurvedaQuiz.bodyKaphaD: Solid frame, gains weight easily, cool moist skin, strong stamina
ayurvedaQuiz.agniSubtitle: Your digestive intelligence determines your dosha imbalance
ayurvedaQuiz.agniQ: My typical digestion and appetite pattern:
ayurvedaQuiz.agniVataD: Hunger varies wildly, bloating, gas, constipation, anxiety around food
ayurvedaQuiz.agniPittaD: Get very hungry if meals are delayed, sharp digestion, heartburn tendency
ayurvedaQuiz.agniKaphaD: Low appetite, slow digestion, feel heavy after eating, rarely constipated
ayurvedaQuiz.manasSubtitle: The mind reveals the deepest Prakriti signature
ayurvedaQuiz.manasQ: My mind and thought patterns naturally tend towards:
ayurvedaQuiz.manasVataD: Fast, imaginative, scattered, worry-prone, inspired but hard to focus
ayurvedaQuiz.manasKaphaD: Stable, methodical, good memory, slow to anger, loyal and patient
ayurvedaQuiz.bhavaSubtitle: Vedic science maps emotions directly to dosha imbalance
ayurvedaQuiz.bhavaQ: Under stress, my dominant emotional response is:
ayurvedaQuiz.bhavaVataD: Worry, overwhelm, inability to settle, freeze response, restlessness
ayurvedaQuiz.bhavaPittaD: Irritability, frustration, need to control, heated arguments, impatience
ayurvedaQuiz.bhavaKaphaD: Sadness, low motivation, over-attachment, depression, deep hibernation
ayurvedaQuiz.indriyaSubtitle: The Indriyas (senses) map the five elements within you
ayurvedaQuiz.indriyaQ: My sensory experience and preferences lean towards:
ayurvedaQuiz.indriyaVataD: Sensitive to noise and cold, light sleeper, loves warmth, talks a lot
ayurvedaQuiz.indriyaPittaD: Light-sensitive, loves visual beauty, strong taste preferences, photo-sensitive
ayurvedaQuiz.indriyaKaphaD: Loves strong scents, comfort food-driven, heavy sleeper, tactile comfort
ayurvedaQuiz.pranaSubtitle: Prana Vata governs the life force cycle
ayurvedaQuiz.pranaQ: My daily energy and sleep experience:
ayurvedaQuiz.pranaVataD: Bursts of energy then sudden fatigue, light sleep with dreams, 5-6 hrs
ayurvedaQuiz.pranaPittaD: Moderate and steady energy, wake early feeling driven, 6-7 hrs
ayurvedaQuiz.pranaKaphaD: Heavy energy, need 8-9+ hrs, hard to wake, feel refreshed but sluggish
ayurvedaQuiz.vikrutiSubtitle: Prakriti is your birth-state; Vikruti is your NOW-state
ayurvedaQuiz.vikrutiQ: Right now, what is most disrupted in your life?
ayurvedaQuiz.vikrutiVataD: Anxiety, insomnia, dry skin/hair, irregular appetite, scattered energy
ayurvedaQuiz.vikrutiPittaD: Inflammation, anger, skin issues, sharp gut problems, perfectionism burning out
ayurvedaQuiz.vikrutiKaphaD: Congestion, weight gain, low motivation, depression, sluggish thyroid/lymph
